extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won from a 29-rider breakaway after bridging late from the chase group, timing his sprint perfectly on the uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: ARMIRAIL Bruno at 18.5min GC became viable Maglia Rosa threat only after 12min gap forced Ineos abandonment of chase.
DENZ bridged from third group to leaders inside final km, exploiting disorganization from multiple chase groups converging simultaneously.
BETTIOL Alberto launched sprint at 300m but uphill finish punished early acceleration, rewarding late-kickers from wheels.

rider_signals.ARMIRAIL Bruno: positive: First French Maglia Rosa since 1999, team willing to sacrifice stage win for 1:41 jersey advantage despite mountain stage next.
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: Second stage in three days shows repeatable sprint power even after bridging efforts late in stage.
rider_signals.GEE Derek: negative: Third second-place finish this Giro reveals positioning skill but lacks top-end power to finish sprints.
rider_signals.ALDANI Umberto: negative: Launched extremely long sprint on uphill finish but 2022 winner lacked legs to sustain effort home.
rider_signals.BAIS Davide: positive: Recovered Maglia Azzurra after losing it previous day by attacking early on Passo Sempione in worsening weather.
